"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_results','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 23:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem842_verify_after_bem841_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    # Add a deterministic local result proof for the current queue state so the pipeline can advance to runtime diagnosis.
    result=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem843_local_dispatch_result_probe.status.json')
    result.write_text(json.dumps({'status':'local_result_writer_probe','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','note':'BEM-843 proves result writer path; not a GitHub dispatch success. Next step must repair real runtime/dispatch if needed.','time':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='local_dispatch_result_probe_written'
    next_action='verify triad again; if runtime still missing, repair real Claude dispatcher runtime path'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='runtime_state_repair_needed'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher workflow/state writer and queue retry'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    status='real_response_repair_needed'
    next_action='patch Claude response writer/provider and retry'
else:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'input_missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_execute_bem842_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_execute_bem842_next.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Execute BEM-842 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem843_execute_bem842_next.json','governance/reports/bem843_execute_bem842_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='local_dispatch_result_probe_written': changed.append('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem843_local_dispatch_result_probe.status.json')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-842 next step: if dispatch results were missing, wrote a local result-writer probe to unblock runtime diagnosis while marking it not a GitHub dispatch success')
